flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Las Positas College fell 29% between 2006 and 2009 (45.4% → 32.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Las Positas College rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Las Positas College fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (71.0% → 53.9%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Las Positas College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $9.8k).
